title: Creating a Customer Avatar
scenario: Develop a customer avatar for a 35-year-old stay-at-home mom named Sarah. Sarah is a busy parent who values convenience, quality, and reliability when it comes to household products. Describe Sarah's demographics, needs, pain points, and behaviors in a concise and detailed way. Use a format that includes sections for demographics, needs, pain points, and behaviors. Keep the description under 200 words.
constraints: Must use a format with sections for demographics, needs, pain points, and behaviors

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the customer avatar adhere to the format and word limit requirements?
Is the customer avatar clear and easy to understand?
Does the customer avatar include all necessary information about the target customer?
